archimate:DataObject.name: Authority Tables
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: Authority tables (also known as Named Authority Lists or NALs are used to harmonise and standardise the codes and associated labels used in various environments (web platforms, systems and applications) and in facilitating data exchanges between the institutions involved in decision-making process and not only.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: Publications Office of the European Union
Source: https://op.europa.eu/en/web/eu-vocabularies/authority-tables
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Reference Data
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AuthorityTablesDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AuthorityTablesDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ReferenceData

properties.value: Publications Office of the European Union

Authority tables (also known as Named Authority Lists or NALs are used to harmonise and standardise the codes and associated labels used in various environments (web platforms, systems and applications) and in facilitating data exchanges between the institutions involved in decision-making process and not only.
